items.line_en: Roger the autopsy report, sir. Miss the right's gonna be the defense. Yes, I heard

coach.say: Roger the autopsy report, sir. Miss the right's gonna be the defense. Yes, I heard
coach.hint: Chunk it: Roger the autopsy report, sir. / Miss the right's gonna be the defense. Yes, I heard

items.line_en: Hey, do you ever wonder how he prepares for a trial on such short notice?

coach.say: Hey, do you ever wonder how he prepares for a trial on such short notice?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hey, / do you ever wonder how he prepares for a trial on such short notice?

items.line_en: The body was found in the kitchen, but was then moved to the conservatory

coach.say: The body was found in the kitchen, but was then moved to the conservatory
coach.hint: Chunk it: The body was found in the kitchen, / but was then moved to the conservatory

items.line_en: We know this because of the bloody footprints in the hall the witness said they saw the suspect leave to the left

coach.say: We know this because of the bloody footprints in the hall the witness said they saw the suspect leave to the left
coach.hint: Chunk it: We know this because / of the bloody footprints in the hall the witness said they saw the suspect leave to the left

items.line_en: But we know they had to have gone right only guilty people can't tell left from right

coach.say: But we know they had to have gone right only guilty people can't tell left from right
coach.hint: Chunk it: But we know they had to have gone right only guilty people can't tell left from right

items.line_en: And I found this empty plate and these shoes and this blood-covered candle stick that now has my finger prints on it

coach.say: And I found this empty plate and these shoes and this blood-covered candle stick that now has my finger prints on it
coach.hint: Chunk it: And I found this empty plate and these shoes and / this blood-covered candle stick that now has my finger prints on it

items.line_en: I don't know how they all fit together yet, but it all points to one thing. Not guilty. I've never been more prepared for a trial in my life

coach.say: I don't know how they all fit together yet, but it all points to one thing. Not guilty. I've never been more prepared for a trial in my life
coach.hint: Chunk it: I don't know how they all fit together yet, / but it all points to one thing. / Not guilty. / I've never been more prepared for a trial in my life

items.line_en: So you got the autopsy report, right?

coach.say: So you got the autopsy report, right?
coach.hint: Chunk it: So you got the autopsy report, / right?

items.line_en: At least you know the name of the victim

coach.say: At least you know the name of the victim
coach.hint: Chunk it: At least you know the name of the victim

items.line_en: Please tell me you at least don't hear a client is

coach.say: Please tell me you at least don't hear a client is
coach.hint: Chunk it: Please tell me you at least don't hear a client is
Chunk it: It's not you again, / right?

items.line_en: No, no, no, wait. I got it. It's me

coach.say: No, no, no, wait. I got it. It's me
